summary: Completed testing of OLL bug fixes. All 8 bug fixes verified working correctly through backend API tests (13/13 passed) and frontend UI tests.

bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Backend API test passed - applied_position_id field correctly sent as empty string instead of null. UI form submission works correctly.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Growth Partner applications from website visibility in Admin GP CRM
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Backend API test passed - GP applications created via API are visible in admin CRM. UI shows TEST_GP applications.
Backend API test passed - selected_offerings field is accepted in school inquiry creation. UI shows 'Offerings: Robotics, Coding' for test school.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Orders page Payment Update modal scrollable
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: UI test confirmed - Modal has max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto classes for scrollability.
Backend API test passed - Educator status counts retrieved correctly. UI shows 'Onboarding 6' tab with correct count.
Code review confirmed - STEP_QUERIES has faq field and clicking query type sets description to query.faq (line 736).

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: School CRM Edit Details button for converted schools
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: UI test confirmed - Converted schools tab shows 'Edit Details' button for each converted school.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Team Applications interview_scheduled status actions (hired/rejected buttons)
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: Backend API test passed - Status can be updated from interview_scheduled to hired/rejected. UI shows 'Interviewed', 'Hired', 'Rejected' buttons for interview_scheduled applications.

seed_data_creation: Created test team applications, growth partner applications, and school inquiries for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 bug fixes from iteration 25 have been verified working. Backend tests cover team applications, growth partners, school inquiries, educators, and orders. UI tests verified admin panel functionality including GP CRM, School CRM converted status, Orders modal, Educators onboarding count, and Team Applications interview actions.
